Your choices will affect the world around you\. Keep the chaos away or foil plots to destroy the world and rise through the ra

embeds.title: PEPPERED: an existential platformer
embeds.description:
ABOUT
PEPPERED is an existential platformer where you have **ONE SHOT at everything\.**

Every choice, every boss battle, and every failure impact the branching plotline and determine how the story will go and how it will end\. Will you save the world \- or fail miserably?…

embeds.title: Arctic Eggs
embeds.description:
Cooked on both sides\. As always

Embrace the truth in Arctic Eggs, or the Tale of the Modern Odysseus\. Slip into the boots of a humble Poultry Peddler, stripped of rank for crimes forgotten\. Pan in hand, set forth and feed the hungry inhabitants of this humble habitat\. It’s all in the wrist\.…

embeds.description: *A time to love, and a time to hate; a time for war, and a time for \[just one more murder…\] \-Ecclesiastes 3\:8*…
